title: oreastrum andersonii
intro: Oreastrum andersonii, also known as the Anderson's oreastrum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to India and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Oreastrum andersonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes, as well as being used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
